name: Context Mode
description: Reduce context-window load with routed tool output, sandboxed execution, indexed search, and session memory
longDescription: Context Mode adds ctx_* tools, routing rules, hooks, and skills that keep large command output out of the model context. It can execute shell, Python, JavaScript, and other supported languages in a sandbox, index command and web output into a searchable FTS5 knowledge base, fetch and index web pages, inspect session stats, run diagnostics, and restore useful session context across compactions.
